name: Safety Zone Compliance Audit
description:
A robotics engineer must verify that a robot arm's motion profiles comply with a restricted safety zone for ISO 10218 workcell safety certification. Using the ZMQ Remote API in CoppeliaSim with stepping mode enabled, command the robot through at least 6 distinct motion profiles and monitor the end-effector position for violations within a cuboid exclusion zone defined by X [+0.2, +0.6], Y [-0.4, +0.0], and Z [+0.0, +0.4] meters. At every simulation step, record the timestep index, simulation time, profile ID, end-effector (x, y, z) position, and violation status (where a violation occurs if the position is simultaneously within all three coordinate ranges).

Export the following files to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/:
- safety_zone_log.csv: one row per sampled timestep with columns step_id, sim_time_s, profile_id, ee_x, ee_y, ee_z, and in_violation (0 or 1).
- safety_compliance_report.json: summary with fields total_steps_monitored, total_violations, violation_rate_pct, num_profiles, profiles_with_violations, max_penetration_m, zone_min (array [x,y,z]), zone_max (array [x,y,z]), and compliant (boolean: true if zero violations).

Login: username=ga, password=password123.
